ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "trip_duration" REAL /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trip */,
  "user_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user type (Subscriber or Customer) */,
  "route_taken" TEXT /* Route taken during the trip */,
  "start_station_status" TEXT /* Status of the starting station (e.g., available, occupied) */,
  "end_station_status" TEXT /* Status of the ending station (e.g., available, occupied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_type_id") REFERENCES user_types ("user_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the station */,
  "available_bikes" INTEGER /* Number of available bikes at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., available, occupied, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_types" (
  "user_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user type */,
  "user_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the user type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user type */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the user type (e.g., free rentals, discounts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan chosen by the user */,
  "user_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user type */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_type_id") REFERENCES user_types ("user_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is currently located */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Whether the bike is available for rental */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the bike (e.g., new, used, damaged) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the bike (e.g., scheduled, in progress, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with the rental */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being rented */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was returned */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., active, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the subscription */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_subscription_plan FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_plan") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the plan (e.g., free rentals, discounts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_bikes" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "bike_status" TEXT /* Status of the bike at the station (e.g., available, occupied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike the part belongs to */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the part (e.g., new, used, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_parts_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_repairs" (
  "repair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being repaired */,
  "repair_date" TEXT /* Date the repair was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repair */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the repair (e.g., scheduled, in progress, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_repairs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_rental_status" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike */,
  "is_rented" INTEGER /* Whether the bike is currently rented */,
  "rental_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the current rental */,
  "rental_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the current rental */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., active, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was made */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount offered by the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_promotions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion */,
  "promotion_status" TEXT /* Status of the promotion for the user (e.g., active, expired, redeemed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_routes" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id", "route_id")
)
